user_message: Working on Fourth Coffee's QBR preparation. Got the email thread -- help me draft a response.

input_artifacts.content:
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 17:26 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fourth Coffee QBR preparation

Our team encountered some challenges with QBR preparation. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
Date: 2024-02-22 11:06 EST
Subject: QBR preparation - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about QBR preparation. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 13:22 EST
Subject: URGENT: QBR preparation Issue at Fourth Coffee

Just checking in on the QBR preparation proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fourth Coffee: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Outage/Complaint Email -> Triage + Escalation template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct QBR preparation decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
